#Ad  I swapped what I stored in my pantry and my lower kitchen cabinets this year and it’s been amazing! Here’s how I’ve made my pantry work for my needs: 1. Added small shelves so I can fill up all the vertical space without stacking things too high 2. Put my staples in clear, airtight containers so they look neat and I can easily get to them for measuring 3. Put jumbo sized turntables in the corners so nothing gets lost 4. Store lids and frying pans vertically so they don’t get scratched and they’re easy to pull out for use 5. Contain small things in clear lazy susans so they’re easy to find and don’t fall over 6. Vinyl labels that I can erase and change if the contents of a container change 7. Adjustable vertical storage for baking pans and serving platters so they aren’t stacked on top of each other
